zh.lifeSummary: 當John Yates於1465年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏哈尼 巴塞特時，他的父親Richard Yate30歲，母親Joan Ashenden30歲。他於1490年與Joan Goddard在英國波克夏利福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1541年3月8日在英國英格蘭波克夏利福德享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾韋斯特 韓尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Yates于1465年出生在英国英格兰波克夏哈尼 巴塞特时，他的父亲Richard Yate30岁，母亲Joan Ashenden30岁。他于1490年与Joan Goddard在英国波克夏利福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1541年3月8日在英国英格兰波克夏利福德享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾韋斯特 韓尼。

nameMeanings.name: Yates
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English yates ‘gates’, plural of yate, Old English geat ‘gate’, hence a topographic or occupational name for someone who lived by the gates of a town or castle and who probably acted as the gatekeeper or porter. Compare Gates . Alternatively, a variant of the singular form Yate, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Yeats
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Yates  .

variants.name: Yeatman
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a gate-keeper, from Middle English yate + man. Compare Yates .

variants.name: Gates
meanings: English: variant of Gate with plural or excrescent -s. The English surname Gate has three possible origins: (i) a topographic name from Middle English gate ‘gate’ (Old English geat, dative plural gatum), denoting someone who lived by a gate or set of gates (possibly sometimes an occupational name for a gate keeper; compre Yates); (ii) in northern England, the East Midlands, and East Anglia, a topographic name from Middle English gate ‘street, road, path’ (Old Norse gata) for someone who lived by a road (compare Street ); (iii) a nickname meaning ‘goat’, from northern Middle English gate, gait (Old English gāt, Old Norse geitr).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French Barrière (see Barriere ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Yates was born in 1465, in Charney Bassett, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Yate, was 30 and his mother, Joan Ashenden, was 30. He married Joan Goddard in 1490, in Lyford, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 March 1541, in Lyford, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in West Hanney, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Yates est né en 1465, à Charney Bassett, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Yate, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Ashenden, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joan Goddard en 1490, à Lyford, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mars 1541, à Lyford, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à West Hanney, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Yatesが1465年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアチャーニー バセットで生まれた時，父Richard Yateは30歳，母Joan Ashendenは30歳であった。1490年にイギリスバークシュアイアリフォードでJoan Goddardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1541年3月8日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアリフォードで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウエスト ハニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Yates(이)가 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 차니 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Yate(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Ashenden(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 버크실르 리퍼드에서 Joan Goddard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1541년 3월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 리퍼드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 웨스트 해니에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Goddard em 1490, em Lyford, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Yates родился в 1465 г. в местности чарни бассетт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Yate было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Ashenden, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Goddard в 1490 г. в местности лифорд, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 марта 1541 г. в местности лифорд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности вест ханни, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan Goddard en 1490, en Lyford, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1541, en Lyford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en West Hanney, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
